---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Mono
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## The use case

What are you trying to do, and what's blocking you? "I need X
because Y" is more useful than "add X".

## The desired behavior

What would make the use case work? Be concrete — describe the
UX, not just the abstract capability.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why isn't it enough? This is
helpful even if the alternative is "I worked around it with
Z", because the workaround probably wouldn't occur to other
people.

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this.
- [ ] I'd help review a PR.
- [ ] No, just an idea.

If you ticked "Yes", link to any prior art, prototypes, or
similar features in other tools that we should consider.

## Anything else?

Mockups, links, related issues, etc.
